headline: What Lilly's Peer-Beating Numbers Cost You

headline: This Healthcare Giant Still Checks Every Box for Long-Term Investors
summary: Johnson and Johnson just raised its full-year outlook toward a historic $100 billion revenue target, yet the stock still trades well below where our model says it should be. The real question is whether the pipeline can outrun the headwinds closing in fast.

headline: Pfizer Vs. Amgen: Bet That Pfizer’s Seagen Integration Leads to Long-Term Oncology Alpha Over Amgen
summary: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) and Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) both reported Q1 2026 results this quarter, and the numbers reveal two very different bets on the future of oncology. Pfizer is monetizing its Seagen deal today. Amgen is defending a biosimilar cliff while spending to rebuild growth from scratch. Padcev Carries Pfizer. Biosimilars Bite Amgen. Pfizer’s oncology ...
